---

## Overview

> A proprietary machine learning / ai system comprising 176 integrated source modules.

**DocTools Pro** is an advanced machine learning / ai system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. Built with Firebase, Flutter/Dart.

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Raw Data Input"] -->|"Ingest"| B["Preprocessing Pipeline"];
    B -->|"Clean Tensors"| D{"Neural Net Engine"};
    D -->|"Training Loop"| E["Inference & Prediction"];
    E -->|"Metrics"| F["Evaluation & Output"];

    style A fill:#1a0011,stroke:#ff6e96,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#2d001e,stroke:#ff6e96,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style D fill:#1a0011,stroke:#ff6e96,stroke-width:3px,color:#fff
    style E fill:#2d001e,stroke:#ff6e96,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style F fill:#45002f,stroke:#ff6e96,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
DocTools-Pro/
  .firebaserc
  .gitignore
  .metadata
  LICENSE
  README.md
  analysis_options.yaml
  firebase.json
  firestore.indexes.json
  android/
    .gitignore
    build.gradle.kts
    gradle.properties
    settings.gradle.kts
  ios/
    .gitignore
  lib/
  linux/
  macos/
  test/
  web/
  windows/
```

<br/>

## Technical Specifications

| Attribute | Detail |
|:---|:---|
| **Primary Language** | `Dart` |
| **Project Category** | `Machine Learning / AI` |
| **Total Source Files** | `176` |
| **Frameworks** | `Firebase`, `Flutter/Dart` |
| **IP Status** | `Strictly Proprietary` |

- **NO PERMISSION** to use, copy, modify, or distribute without written consent.

*By viewing this repository, you accept these proprietary terms.*
